name: @vaelonx/agent-tunnel
description: VaelonX Tunnel — relay between cloud AI agents and local machines (files, shell, desktop control) over a permissioned reverse tunnel with HMAC signing

scripts.build: bun build src/agent/cli.ts --outfile dist/agent-tunnel.js --target node && bun build src/client/cli.ts --outfile dist/agent-tunnel-cli.js --target node && sed -i '1s|^|#!/usr/bin/env node\n|' dist/agent-tunnel.js dist/agent-tunnel-cli.js
